text: Done with the San Marco loop, 6.2 miles. Heading back now. Still on for tennis with Ravi at 3?
Yes. Kyle's driving down today — can we do dinner after your match? He gets in around 5.
Works. I'll keep Ravi to 90 minutes. He's been targeting my backhand all week anyway, won't be hard to cut short 😄
Ha. Town Hall or somewhere Kyle won't complain about the wait this time?
San Marco Osteria. Book us for 6:30 — gives buffer if the courts run over. Tell Kyle bring an appetite.
Done. Grab kombucha on the way back? We're out.
Kyle, 5am run tomorrow — you in? Thinking the Riverside route, maybe 6 miles. I'll be at your door at 5:15 sharp, no waiting.
Ugh dad it's summer. Can we do 6am at least? My body is not a cardiologist on call schedule lol
6am is fine. Soft. But fine. Bring water, last time you were cramping by mile 4 and I had to hear about it the whole way back.
That was ONE time and it was humid as hell. Deal though. Riverside bridge loop?
Bridge loop then south along the river. Should be cooler by the water. Karen's making eggs after if you want to stick around.
Yeah I'm there for the eggs honestly. See you at 6. Don't be early.
Em, did you see the Jaguars game? Was doing a late cath at Baptist and caught the last quarter on my phone between cases 😂 Ravi kept texting me play-by-play like I wasn't trying to place a stent.
Dad you were literally doing heart surgery and watching football simultaneously. Peak you honestly.
To be fair the stent went in perfectly. Anyway — you still coming down to Jacksonville this weekend? Karen's been asking and I've got Saturday afternoon free before tennis with Ravi.
Yes!! Driving down Friday night. Can we do that Cuban place on San Marco? Also mom said you ran like 9 miles this morning??? Are you training for something??
Just keeping the engine clean. Cardiology joke — never mind. And yes, El Tapatio, already have a reservation for 7:30. Your mom texted me the same question three times so I handled it.
Lol you're so type A. Ok see you guys Friday, tell Mom I'm bringing that wine she liked. Love you ❤️
Grant addendum ready for review.
Vog readings stable, field day on.
